CustomField.description: Plain-English summary of scan results, generated after the scan completes by ScanSummaryQueueable (e.g. "This scan found 42 dependencies: 5 Apex classes, 3 active Flows"). Displayed in the Scan Summary card. Populated asynchronously after Status = Completed - may appear a few seconds after the scan finishes. Null for Failed, Cancelled, and Paused jobs. Ref: ISP-6072
CustomField.label: Scan Summary Text
